0:
Lisette would hear a full report of your efforts as an emissary of love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Lisette would hear a full report of your efforts as an emissary of love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Lisette commends your service on House Valentione's behalf, her ancestral senses telling her that your deeds have provided no small degree of solace to those lost in love. To reward you for your efforts, she deigns to offer you the opportunity to find love of your own. Trade with a <If(PlayerParameter(4))>dashing gentleman<Else/>lovely lady</If> to obtain two types of chocolate─bitter and pure heart─and deliver the pair of confections to Lisette.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

49:
“Oh, Lisette! Pray honor me with a piece of your chocolate!”
I'd just as soon <Emphasis>honor</Emphasis> the lot of them with a swift kick to the face.
